regions.text: We need to be alone sometimes, but we also need other people to know them and ourselves better. The more men know one another, the better they can live together.
Nations—Chinese, Indians, British, Russians, Germans, Americans, French—know little of one another and live in different worlds.
This is good only if they have bridges between their separate worlds and know enough about each other.
alone: by oneself. nations: countries under independent government. independent: not dependent.
